testcase.name: test_daily_snapshot_returns_correct_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_closing_snapshot.py:53: in test_daily_snapshot_returns_correct_structure assert "date_display" in data, "Missing 'date_display' field" E AssertionError: Missing 'date_display' field E assert 'date_display' in {'accounts': [], 'by_custodian': [], 'by_type': {}, 'date': '2026-02-19', ...}

testcase.name: test_daily_snapshot_default_date_is_today
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_closing_snapshot.py:83: in test_daily_snapshot_default_date_is_today assert data["is_today"] == True, "Expected is_today to be True" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'is_today'

testcase.name: test_daily_snapshot_with_specific_date
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_closing_snapshot.py:96: in test_daily_snapshot_with_specific_date assert data["is_today"] == False, "Expected is_today to be False for yesterday" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'is_today'

testcase.name: test_empty_accounts_returns_zero_totals
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_closing_snapshot.py:240: in test_empty_accounts_returns_zero_totals if data["account_count"] == 0: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'account_count'
